nodes.title: Scientists study the natural and material world
nodes.description: Scientists study the natural and material world.

academic_standards.description: Scientists study the natural and material world.

nodes.title: Developing and using technology has impacts on the natural world
nodes.description: Developing and using technology has impacts on the natural world.

academic_standards.description: Developing and using technology has impacts on the natural world.

nodes.title: Every human-made product is designed by applying some knowledge of the natura...
nodes.description: Every human-made product is designed by applying some knowledge of the natural world and is built using materials derived from the natural world.

academic_standards.description: Every human-made product is designed by applying some knowledge of the natural world and is built using materials derived from the natural world.

nodes.title: Asking questions, making observations, and gathering information are helpful ...

nodes.title: Water is found in the ocean, rivers, lakes, and ponds
nodes.description: Water is found in the ocean, rivers, lakes, and ponds. Water exists as solid ice and in liquid form.

academic_standards.description: Water is found in the ocean, rivers, lakes, and ponds. Water exists as solid ice and in liquid form.

nodes.title: Maps show where things are located
nodes.description: Maps show where things are located. One can map the shapes and kinds of land and water in any area.

nodes.title: Wind and water can change the shape of the land

nodes.title: Some events happen very quickly
nodes.description: Some events happen very quickly; others occur very slowly, over a time period much longer than one can observe.

academic_standards.description: Some events happen very quickly; others occur very slowly, over a time period much longer than one can observe.

nodes.title: There are many different kinds of living things in any area, and they exist i...
nodes.description: There are many different kinds of living things in any area, and they exist in different places on land and in water.

nodes.title: Heating or cooling a substance may cause changes that can be observed
nodes.description: Heating or cooling a substance may cause changes that can be observed. Sometimes these changes are reversible, and sometimes they are not.

nodes.description: Obtain information using various texts, text features (e.g., headings, tables of contents, glossaries, electronic menus, icons), and other media that will be useful in answering a scientific question.
